data.body:
[Total Assault · BETA Preview]

Total Assault · BETA - Binah (Field Warfare) will be held on 11/16 (Tue)!
Are you ready to face your first powerful boss?

Go to the official Discord and check out the game guide and tips from other Sensei's.

https://discord.com/invite/bluearchiveglobal
#BlueArchive
